title: festuca caespitosa
intro: Festuca caespitosa, also known as the mountain fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Festuca caespitosa lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, and its ability to boost the immune system. Festuca caespitosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some traditional practices also using it as a poultice to treat wounds and skin irritations.
